courses.title: Foundations of Inclusive Leadership QA QA
courses.description: Learn the fundamentals of inclusive leadership through interactive lessons, including TED Talks, quizzes, and practical frameworks.

lessons.title: The Power of Vulnerability
lessons.description: Watch this inspiring TED Talk by Brené Brown
